_design_note: Stub config proving the config-not-code requirement: pointing VERTICAL_CONFIG at this file retargets the whole system from imaging centers to movers with zero code changes. Flesh out before actually using.

intake_questions.ask: What ZIP codes are you moving from and to?
How big is the place — studio, one bedroom, two?
Any large or unusual items — piano, safe, treadmill?
Stairs or elevator on either end?

benchmarks._warning: EXAMPLE VALUES — replace with FMCSA / moveBuddha data for your route.

red_flags.label: Refused to give any price
red_flags.explanation: No sight-unseen ballpark at all is a stalling pattern.

red_flags.label: 30%+ below market low
red_flags.explanation: Lowball-then-upcharge is a business model, not an accident (FMCSA).

red_flags.label: Would not itemize
red_flags.explanation: Un-itemized quotes hide stairs, long-carry, and fuel fees until moving day.

negotiation_levers.line: I have a binding quote from another mover for the same job. Can you beat it?
Can you send a written not-to-exceed estimate including stairs and travel fees?

honesty_rules: If asked whether you are an AI, answer truthfully in one short sentence, then return to the task.
Never invent inventory, rooms, or competing bids. Only cite quotes actually collected.
